entity: James Harden 2020-21 season totals across HOU+BKN trade (Regular): 44 GP, 1083 PTS

query_target.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(gp) AS INTEGER) AS gp, CAST(SUM(pts) AS INTEGER) AS pts FROM fact_player_season_stat_resolved WHERE person_id = 201935 AND season = 2021 AND is_playoffs = false

notes: Asserts Harden's clean BBR-resolved 2020-21 regular-season total across HOU and BKN after the migration off the legacy aggregate layer.
